text:
First Lieutenant , also spelt Liza Hawkeye in the trading card game, is an officer of the Amestrian State Military as well as Colonel Roy Mustang's trusted second-in-command and bodyguard, forming a part of his Mustang Unit. A firearms specialist and sharpshooter, Lt. Hawkeye is an invaluable asset to the Colonel both in office and on the battlefield and serves as his closest and most supportive subordinate.
